series_metadata.series_description: Includes information about the serotyping of specimens for salmonella and other miscellaneous bacteria. Includes inform- ation from lab reports, data cards, and logs. Laboratory reports include informaiton on patient name, requesting physician, date of

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for six month then transfer to the State Records Center for 1.5 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
